title: GPS Outdoor Asset Tracker
description: Low-power GPS tracker for vehicles or outdoor equipment. Publishes location over MQTT via ESP32 WiFi on movement events and periodic heartbeat; logs to microSD when offline.
objective: Fix ≤ 10 m CEP; ≤ 5 s cold start outdoors; wake on >5 m movement; ≥ 1-week battery at 1 fix/10 min.
supporting_fact_titles: MQTT Protocol for IoT Sensor Data
NTP Time Synchronisation for Data Logging
design_element_titles: MCU Deep-Sleep Duty Cycle Power Management
Li-Po 3.7 V USB-C Rechargeable Battery Pack

element_usage_notes.NEO-6M GPS Module for Navigation: Sleep between fixes; 1 Hz NMEA UART 9600 baud; backup battery for warm start.
element_usage_notes.MCU Deep-Sleep Duty Cycle Power Manageme: ESP32 10-min deep sleep; RTC wakeup; ≤ 12 µA idle current.
